历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group (including physics category) was approximately 9261 → 8109 → 4021 → 2273 → 2104, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition), stabilizing in the 2100–2300 range in recent two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 2104; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 250 in 2021 → 199 in 2022 → 211 in 2023 → 147 in 2024 → 132 in 2025, decreasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 132, unchanged from 2025, with neutral expansion/contraction pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 28th on the Soft Science main list (stable from 2021 to 2026), a top national engineering powerhouse; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving historical abnormal admission signals (rumors of a gap in the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering in 2023); Douyin popularity ranking 55th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high; no obvious gap records; Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, a total of 10 A-class disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., are highly popular and recommended, with strong application willingness; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 111,492 in 2025, easing competition slightly; Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning, adjacent to Jilin Province, with strong regional preference; the university's enrollment share in Jilin's science group is about 0.16% (132/80,421), at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (stabilizing in recent two years), unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, slight decrease in provincial candidate numbers, and high popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly eased compared to 2025, with a small backward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2134, with a range of 1878–2390.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (1878–2390), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1878), focus on Tier 1 top majors like Artificial Intelligence/Electronic Information classes; if the ranking is near the upper limit (>2390), prioritize Tier 3 safety majors while considering Tier 2 medium majors. Dalian University of Technology has outstanding engineering strength, and majors corresponding to advantageous disciplines such as Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, etc., are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group (including history category) was approximately 1333 → 1437 → 2002 → 1336 → 1717, with significant fluctuations and no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 1717th place; the provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan was 19 in 2021 → 19 in 2022 → 35 in 2023 → 37 in 2024 → 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 30, a reduction of 7 students (approximately -18.9%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 28th on the Soft Science main list, belonging to the top national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving abnormal historical admission signals; Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively popular), with overall moderate attention; Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, etc., with liberal arts majors mainly including Journalism and Communication, Philosophy, Public Administration, and Foreign Languages, which have low correlation with the university's engineering advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Foreign Languages are generally wait-and-see, and the overall popularity of liberal arts majors is low; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 110,868, slightly lower than in 2025, but the reduction in enrollment is larger; Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning, adjacent to Jilin Province, with strong regional preference; the university's liberal arts group enrollment in Jilin Province accounts for about 0.10% (30/30,932), which is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as significant fluctuations in historical rankings, a notable reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-18.9%), and low social popularity of liberal arts majors, competition is expected to intensify in 2026, with rankings moving forward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1502nd place, with a range of 1322–1682.
